zh.lifeSummary: Abigail Howland於大約1635年出生在美國羅得島紐波特紐波特。她於1656年10月10日與Zoeth Howland在美國羅得島紐波特紐波特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1707年1月20日在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯度波利享年73歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Abigail Howland于大约1635年出生在美国罗德岛州紐波特紐波特。她于1656年10月10日与Zoeth Howland在美国罗德岛州紐波特紐波特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1707年1月20日在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯度波利享年73岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Howland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

en.lifeSummary: Abigail Howland was born about 1635, in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. She married Zoeth Howland on 10 October 1656, in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 January 1707, in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 73, and was buried in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Abigail Howland est née environ 1635, à Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Elle a épousé Zoeth Howland le 10 octobre 1656, à Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 janvier 1707, à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Abigail Howland wurde um 1635 in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten geboren. Sie hat am 10. Oktober 1656 in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten Zoeth Howland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Januar 1707 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Abigail Howland è nata il circa 1635 nel Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Lei sposato Zoeth Howland il 10 ottobre 1656, nel Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 gennaio 1707, nel Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Howlandは約1635年にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトニュープオルトで生まれた。1656年10月10日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトニュープオルトでZoeth Howlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1707年1月20日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスダクスブリーで73歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스
ko.Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트
ko.Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Howland(은)는 대략 1635년 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 뉴포트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1656년 10월 10일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 뉴포트에서 Zoeth Howland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1707년 1월 20일 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 드스버이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Abigail Howland nasceu aproximadamente 1635, em Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Ela casou-se com Zoeth Howland em 10 de outubro de 1656, em Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1707, em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Abigail Howland родилась около 1635 г. в местности нюпорт, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Zoeth Howland 10 октября 1656 г. в местности нюпорт, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 января 1707 г. в местности дуксбури, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
